headline: Is It Too Late To Consider Buying Amphenol (APH) After Its Strong 1-Year Rally?
summary: For readers wondering whether Amphenol's current share price still offers value or if most of the upside has already been realized, this article breaks down what the numbers can and cannot tell you about the stock. Amphenol's share price last closed at US$125.00, with returns that fell 2.4% over the past week and 17.3% over the past month, while still sitting up 10.5% year to date and 44.9% over the last year. Recent moves in the stock have come alongside continuing interest in the company...
